mapper.sql: select id, task_name, bid_id, compare_bid_id, source_type, status, total_count, issue_count, total_text_length, overall_similarity, start_time, finish_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, del_flag from tdw_duplicate_task
mapper.insert: insert into tdw_duplicate_task(task_name, bid_id, compare_bid_id, source_type, status, total_count, issue_count, total_text_length, overall_similarity, start_time, finish_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, del_flag) values(#{taskName}, #{bidId}, #{compareBidId}, #{sourceType}, #{status}, #{totalCount}, #{issueCount}, #{totalTextLength}, #{overallSimilarity}, #{startTime}, #{finishTime}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{remark}, #{delFlag})
mapper.delete:
update tdw_duplicate_task set del_flag = '2', update_time = now() where id in
#{id}
